name: Five Nights of Bot Management (or something like that)

Something like fnaf yeah lol. Anyways...

Characters:

Lobbet the Dog (#5) - Just a big bully. He might break your cameras and you will have to fix them.

Orben the Bunny (#27) - Silly little thing. Keep her cooled and she wont harm you.

Bontis the Cat (#-7) - A trickster. He will crawl through the vents, just zap him.

Tumble the Hamster (#12) - Tumble is just... Tumble. he will just go around and jam your doors sometimes for a little while.
